video.title: When Trust Costs $50,000: The Business Betrayal That Destroyed Everything
video.description: John trusted his partner for 3 years. Built a startup from zero. Everything in Mike's name. When the company hit $5M valuation, Mike transferred everything to his personal account and blocked John. Two years of lawsuits. $200K in legal fees. Lost house, savings, self-respect. Mike? Living in Bali with $2M. Trust is expensive. Always protect yourself with contracts. Follow for more betrayal stories that teach you how to protect yourself from the same mistake.

story.hook: If you loan money to a friend, get it in writing. Here's what happens when you trust with $50,000...
